xslData S3 class

Source: R/xslData-class.R
xslData-class.Rd

xslData S3 class

Constructor for xslData S3 class

Usage

xslData(
  train = list(),
  test = list(),
  accuracy = numeric(),
  n_subj = numeric(),
  label = "",
  condition = "",
  description = "",
  response_matrix = NULL
)

new_xslData(x = list())

Arguments

train

Training data

test

Test data

accuracy

Accuracy data

n_subj

Number of subjects

label

Label

condition

Condition

description

Description

response_matrix

Response matrix

x

List with elements train, test, accuracy, n_subj, label, condition, descrption, response_matrix

Value

An object of class xslData
